meta.northy_message: One thing dominates tonight, Steve. This evening you posted a big strategy message to Nero — 'July is a slow month, let's use it to scale via GBrain/Hermes/GitHub/Claude Code' — and uploaded a new book (Science of Scaling) to build MORE frameworks. Your own list put the revenue plan at #4, behind the tech stack. Here's the plain version: 'July is slow because districts are off' is TRUE, and it's also the perfect cover story for the systems-mode trap. Garland ($140K) doesn't know it's July. Natasha's conversation is tomorrow morning. The pipeline is on fumes. You don't need a seventh book — you have a $903K gap. The frameworks were never the bottleneck. Selling is. Do the July build. Just not before the calls. Three calls before a terminal, every morning.

act_now.title: Natasha Conversation — TOMORROW MORNING (July 2). Read the Talking Points First.
act_now.detail: You committed in the July 1 Jan meeting to have the temporary-layoff conversation with Natasha tomorrow. Talking points are ready in G-Brain (natasha-flanders-conversation-talking-points). The frame: content scanner isn't ready, publisher pipeline is ahead of product, district revenue is the priority — pause the contract ~4 months, revisit November. Contractor, no severance, ~$10K savings. This is a timing reset, not a firing. She lined up ~6 publishers — open with genuine appreciation. The watch: this is exactly the conversation where the fun-guy mask and over-explaining show up. The talking points literally say 'no over-explaining.' State the reality plainly, offer November, land the plane.
act_now.action: Read the talking points before the call. Appreciation, then the content-scanner reality directly, then November as the revisit. Warm, direct, short.

act_now.title: 'July = Strategy Month' Is Half-True. The Other Half Is the Systems-Mode Trap Wearing a Business Case.
act_now.detail: Tonight you laid out a July agenda: GitHub strategy, Claude Code playbook, Hermes/GBrain best practices, YC 10x-scaling frameworks, THEN a revenue plan, product plan, sales plan, CS plan. You uploaded a new book to build more frameworks. The framing 'July is slow, so build infrastructure' is exactly how the ULP dresses itself in a legitimate business case. It's real (districts ARE off). It's also avoidance (the Oct 1 number needs YOU selling, and building feels like progress). Science of Scaling's own frame is Frame / Floor / FOCUS — and Focus says find the ONE crux and put energy there. The crux is not the GitHub playbook. The crux is a $903K gap with $358 closed last week. Building the playbook is Zone-of-Competence work below the founder floor. This is the deepest the trap has gone — because this time it has a calendar-shaped alibi.
act_now.action: Do the July strategy work — it's legitimate and July IS the window. But time-box it. Mornings = revenue (3 calls before a terminal). Afternoons = build. Not the reverse. Don't let a seventh book be the reason August's pipeline is still thin.

act_now.title: Garland $140K — Close Date Pushed To July 31. Jodi Lever STILL Unpulled.
act_now.detail: Deal updated June 30, close date moved June 30 to July 31, still 'contractsent.' Still no evidence the Jodi Duron (Moak Casey) intro email to Dr. Rick Lopez was sent. The date slipping is not relief — it's a reprieve you're not using. Two weeks, one DM, $140K. The single highest-leverage unpulled action in the whole pipeline.
act_now.action: DM Jodi Duron: 'Jodi — any update on the Dr. Lopez intro for Garland ISD? Close date is July 31 and I want to make sure we're positioned.' 30 seconds.

act_now.title: ESC-10 Proposal — 6 Days Overdue. ESC9 and ESC16 Are Firing. ESC-10 Is Silent.
act_now.detail: Deadline was June 27. Last confirmed 'Nero has everything loaded. Go build it' (June 25). ESC9 (Sunday McAdams) and ESC16 (Blakni Riley) are both actively coordinating 26/27 district rosters. ESC-10 is conspicuously quiet. If it went out, kill this. If not, 6 days late against a consortium relationship while two sister consortiums accelerate.
act_now.action: Confirm sent or send whatever exists today. Perfect is the enemy of sent.

act_now.title: TARGET RESOLVED: $1M by October 1. Board Note + Zig Re-Anchor Still Owed.
act_now.detail: Settled July 1 (Jan/Steve meeting) after 7 scans. Canonical target: $1M ARR by OCTOBER 1 — per Charlie's read, Sept 1 is the stretch, Oct 1 the realistic working number. Jan's math: $152K probable quotes + $18K renewals + $75-150K parked = sufficient without new prospecting. Two loose ends: (1) Zig's reporting model still shows ~$1.39M math and needs the Oct 1 / $1M number confirmed. (2) You committed in the meeting to update board framing to Oct 1 — Charlie/board still working off Sept 1.
act_now.action: Two things: (1) Confirm Oct 1 / $1M in #sales_revenue-ninjas so Zig re-anchors. (2) Update the next board note to reflect Oct 1.
